residential_density_dph: 200–250 units per hectare; up to ~300 uph; general presumption against >300 uph
plot_ratio: Central 2.5–3.0; Regeneration 1.5–3.0; Conservation 1.5–2.0; Outer 1.0–2.5; over 3.0 needs compelling case
private_open_space: 10 sq.m per bedspace (houses); 5–8 sq.m per bedspace inner city
car_parking_dwelling: Housing: 1 per 4 dwellings (Zone 1) to 1 per 2 (Zones 2/3); apartments 0.5–1 per dwelling (maxima)
building_height: Mid-rise 4–8 storeys for street scale; height increases at brownfield/infill/SDRAs/transit corridors
trigger_AA: All applications screened for AA; Stage 2 AA + NIS where significant effects likely
trigger_EIA: All applications EIA-screened; mandatory thresholds per P&D Regulations 2001; sub-threshold where significant effects likely
trigger_AHIA: Built Heritage and Archaeology standards (Section 15.15); protected structures/ACAs
trigger_EcIA: Required for development within or adjacent to sensitive habitat/ecological corridor/protected habitats or species
trigger_TTA: Traffic and Transport Assessment via Section 15.16 / Appendix 5; may be required for childcare vehicular drop-off
notes: Standards split between Chapter 15 (written statement) and Vol 2 Appendices 3 (density/height/plot ratio/site coverage) & 5 (parking). Predominantly urban; rural/ribbon/sightline criteria not enumerated. Flood risk in Chapter 9, not Chapter 15.
